calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-27-2010 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jul-29-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr., Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Stephen L. Porter, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Battery Tai Shing Corporation.
June Kwan, Vice President of Battery Tai Shing Corporation, was placed under oath and examined.
No apppearanc by defendant Moore, Clayton & Co., Inc.
Default was entered against defendant on June 10, 2010.
Doe defendants were dismissed on June 10, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Battery Tain Shing Corporation, and against the Defaulted Defendant Moore, Clayton & Co., Inc. as follows:

Damages/Principal - $303,853.28.
Prejudgment Interest - $28,553.88.
Attorney Fees - $2,405.01.
Costs - $373.98, for a total judgment in the amount of $335,186.15.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
